(function() { try { var script = document.createElement('script'); if ('async') { script.async = true; } script.src = '/browser-sync/browser-sync-client.js?v=2.29.3'.replace("HOST", location.hostname); if (document.body) { document.body.appendChild(script); } else if (document.head) { document.head.appendChild(script); } } catch (e) { console.error("Browsersync: could not append script tag", e); } })() //]]>
